action.prompt: Append a new entry to /home/vikash/Dashboard/prompt-history.md documenting the task that was just completed in this session. Follow the existing format: a new '## Prompt N: <short title>' section with the current Date, a Type, the user's Prompt quoted with a blockquote, and an Outcome describing what was done. Increment the prompt number based on the last entry. Also add a corresponding row to the Summary table. Do NOT duplicate an entry that already exists for the same prompt. If no meaningful task was performed (e.g., a pure question with no file changes), skip the update.
